services.name: Brow Shape
services.description: Includes a standard eyebrow wax.

services.name: Brow Shape & Stain
services.description: Includes an eyebrow wax & stain application. For a longer lasting brow stain than a standard tint — our hybrid stain can last up to 4–6 weeks on the hair and 1–2 weeks on the skin.

services.name: Brow Shape & Tint
services.description: Includes an eyebrow wax & tint application.

services.name: Brow Lamination
services.description: Includes an eyebrow lamination only.

services.name: Brow Lamination + Shape & Stain
services.description: Includes an eyebrow lamination with a shape and your choice of stain or tint application.

services.name: Lash Lift
services.description: Includes a lash lift only.

services.name: Express Refresh Facial
services.description: Our 30-minute facial is the ultimate skin refresh — designed for those seeking visible results in minimal time. Thoughtfully tailored to your individual skin concerns, this revitalising treatment delivers a moment of relaxation while restoring your skin's natural glow. Your experience includes a double cleanse, gentle exfoliation, customised treatment mask, and finishing products selected to nourish, hydrate, and leave your complexion radiant.

services.name: Signature Facial
services.description: Indulge in a results-driven luxury facial experience designed to restore radiance, elevate skin health, and promote deep relaxation. Combining advanced medical-grade skincare with a refined treatment experience, this comprehensive facial leaves your skin visibly rejuvenated, luminous, and refreshed. Your signature facial experience begins with a meticulous double cleanse, followed by gentle steam and exfoliation to refine and prepare the skin. A soothing facial, neck, and décolletage massage relieves tension while enhancing circulation, before a hydrating mask is applied. As your skin is nourished, enjoy a calming scalp massage & finishing products to complete your treatment.

services.name: LED Light Therapy Add-On
services.description: LED light therapy is the perfect addition to any facial service to maximise results.

services.name: Signature Hydrafacial
services.description: Reveal your most radiant skin with our Signature HydraFacial — a results-driven treatment designed to deeply cleanse, hydrate and rejuvenate the complexion in one luxurious experience. Using advanced vortex fusion technology, this multi-step facial gently exfoliates, removes impurities and infuses the skin with intensive hydrating and antioxidant-rich serums tailored to your skin's unique needs. Perfect for dullness, dehydration, congestion and uneven texture, this treatment instantly restores luminosity while leaving the skin refreshed, plump and glowing with long-lasting hydration.

services.name: Deluxe Hydrafacial
services.description: A step up from our Signature Hydrafacial treatment, the Deluxe Hydrafacial includes personalised booster infusion + LED light therapy.

services.name: Platinum Hydrafacial
services.description: Includes lymphatic drainage, personalised booster infusion and LED light therapy.

services.name: Beauty Peel
services.description: Our entry level herbal peel treatment. Our Herbal Aktiv B Peel is an advanced plant-based corrective treatment designed to work in harmony with the skin's natural renewal and regeneration processes. This results-driven treatment helps stimulate and accelerate skin renewal, visibly improving overall skin health, clarity and radiance. Formulated with a pure botanical blend free from harsh chemicals, synthetic binders and abrasives, the Herbal Aktiv B Peel delivers powerful skin rejuvenation without toxic side effects.

services.name: Phyto Peel
services.description: Our mid level herbal peel treatment. The Herbs2Peel Phyto Peel is an advanced herbal skin revision treatment designed to stimulate the skin's natural renewal process from within for transformative, long-lasting results. Ideal for concerns including acne, pigmentation, congestion, scarring, uneven texture, dullness and signs of ageing. The phyto peel has a 3–5 day downtime period.

services.name: Corrective Peel
services.description: Our highest level, most corrective Herbal Aktiv Peel. If you are new to this treatment please book a skin consultation before booking.

services.name: Signature Skin Needling
services.description: Reveal smoother, firmer, more radiant skin with our powerhouse skin rejuvenation treatment. Suitable for a wide range of skin concerns, our advanced Dermapen 4 skin needling treatment works by creating precise micro-channels within the skin using ultra-fine needles. This controlled injury process stimulates your skin's natural healing response, boosting collagen and elastin production while accelerating cell turnover for healthier, stronger, and more youthful-looking skin.

services.name: Advanced Skin Needling
services.description: Enhance our signature skin needling treatment with targeted meso-glide serum infusion.

services.name: Platinum Skin Needling
services.description: The ultimate treatment in advanced skin correction and rejuvenation. Experience Dermapen 4 skin needling elevated to the next level with the infusion of cutting-edge EXOSOME serum technology. Designed to amplify your results, this powerful treatment delivers a concentrated blend of growth factors, peptides, antioxidants and lipids deep into the skin to support accelerated healing, enhanced cellular regeneration and intensive skin renewal.

services.name: Course of 3 Signature Skin Needling
services.description: The perfect opportunity to bundle up your treatments and save on every treatment. Ideal for those who are ready to commit to their skin journey. Please contact us directly after purchasing a package to schedule your treatments.

services.name: Course of 6 Signature Skin Needling
services.description: The ultimate investment in your skin health journey. Please contact us directly after purchasing a package to schedule your treatments.

services.name: Advanced Add On — Uber Pro Peel
services.description: Enhance your skin needling treatment results with our Uber Pro Peel addition.
